panels.title: OHLCV freshness — age / expected period (green <2x, yellow <4x, red >=4x)

targets.rawSql: WITH recents AS (SELECT exchange, symbol, interval, max(ts) AS last_ts, CASE interval WHEN '1m' THEN 60 WHEN '5m' THEN 300 WHEN '15m' THEN 900 WHEN '1h' THEN 3600 WHEN '1d' THEN 86400 END AS period_s FROM market_data.crypto_ohlcv GROUP BY exchange, symbol, interval) SELECT exchange || '/' || symbol || '/' || interval AS metric, round(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - last_ts))::numeric / period_s, 2) AS value FROM recents ORDER BY 1;
SELECT exchange || '/' || symbol AS metric, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(ts)))::int AS value FROM market_data.crypto_trades GROUP BY exchange, symbol ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Polymarket — last market discovered & last price tick

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'polymarket/markets' AS metric, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - to_timestamp(max(window_ts))))::int AS value FROM market_data.polymarket_markets UNION ALL SELECT 'polymarket/prices' AS metric, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(ts)))::int AS value FROM market_data.polymarket_prices;

panels.title: OHLCV write rate — rows per minute (last 1h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time, exchange || '/' || symbol || '/' || interval AS metric, count(*)::float AS value FROM market_data.crypto_ohlcv WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Trades write rate — rows per minute (last 1h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time, exchange || '/' || symbol AS metric, count(*)::float AS value FROM market_data.crypto_trades WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;
